description: Sent to the submitter when their idea successfully moves to the next stage
subject: [G42 SaaS Factory] Your Idea Has Progressed — Now in {{current_stage}}
body:
Great News — Your Idea Has Moved Forward

Dear {{submitter_name}},

We're pleased to let you know that your idea "{{idea_name}}" has successfully passed the {{previous_stage}} gate review and has moved to the {{current_stage}} stage.

What does this mean?

Your idea is progressing through our evaluation pipeline. The team will now work on the {{current_stage}} stage requirements. We will keep you updated as things move forward.

Idea{{idea_name}}
Previous Stage{{previous_stage}}
Current Stage{{current_stage}}

If you have any questions, please reach out to the SaaS Factory team.

Best regards,
G42 SaaS Factory Team

You are receiving this because you submitted this idea to the G42 SaaS Factory Board.
